description_long: This object is a vintage handheld electronic game, specifically a Nintendo Game & Watch 'Octopus' model. It features a rectangular red plastic body with a metallic front faceplate, a wide LCD screen displaying a colorful underwater scene, and printed game instructions. The front panel includes two round control buttons on either side of the screen, as well as several smaller buttons for game selection and time setting. The back of the device has a battery compartment, speaker grill, and a fold-out metal stand for tabletop use. The overall design is compact and portable, with clear branding and game artwork on the front.
description: A vintage Nintendo Game & Watch 'Octopus' handheld electronic game with a red plastic body, metallic faceplate, and wide LCD screen.
description_view_0: The back view shows the red plastic casing, battery compartment, speaker grill, and a fold-out metal stand.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the device's thickness, the protruding control buttons, and the edge of the metallic faceplate.
description_view_2: The front view displays the wide LCD screen with game artwork, two round control buttons, smaller function buttons, and clear Nintendo branding.
description_view_3: This opposite angled side view shows the right-side control buttons and the metal stand partially visible underneath.
